palette.description: All colors used must be in allowed_hex. No exceptions.
palette.check: every pixel/fill/stroke color must match an entry in visual.palette.allowed_hex

contrast.description: Minimum WCAG AA contrast ratio for all text on background.

typography_caps.description: Headlines must be ALL CAPS when all_caps_default is true.
typography_caps.check: if typography.rules.all_caps_default === true, headline text must be uppercase

logo_clearspace.description: Logo must have clearspace_ratio * min(width, height) of empty space around it.
logo_clearspace.check: no element overlaps within clearspace zone of logo bounding box

safe_margins.description: No text or critical elements within safe_margins.pct of any edge.
safe_margins.check: all text and CTA elements are inset by at least layout.safe_margins.pct * dimension

max_fonts.description: No more than max_fonts distinct font families used.

banned_phrases.description: Copy must not contain any banned phrases.
banned_phrases.check: no text element contains any string from voice.banned_phrases (case-insensitive)
